articles.title: Monero Team Receives Anonymous $500,000 Donation
articles.description: The Monero development team has received a significant anonymous donation of $500,000 to support its ongoing projects and initiatives. The contribution underscores growing interest and investment in the privacy-focused cryptocurrency, which aims to enhance user anonymity in digital transactions. The team plans to utilize the funds to further develop Monero's technology and ensure its...

articles.title: Ripple CEO Replies To Former SEC Chairman On Crypto Regulation, They See Eye To Eye?
articles.description: Ripple and the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) have an ongoing legal battle. The regulator filed an action against the payment company at the end of 2020. articles.title: XRP Supply Shock Could Be Coming if Ripple Decides To Settle SEC Lawsuit, Says Crypto Legal Expert
articles.description: A crypto legal expert is predicting that Ripple’s native token XRP may face a supply shock if the San Francisco-based firm settles its lawsuit with the U.S Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). articles.description: Following the recent cryptocurrency market crash that saw the price of bitcoin plunge from a near $64,000 all-time high to $29,900 before it recovered to $36,000, open interest for bitcoin has dropped significantly, while for Ethereum it surged.
